title: Promega BacTiter-Glo Assay
author: NUS iGEM
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8ekhtcw

steps.instruction: Prepare BacTiter-Glo reagent mix by transferring BacTiter-Glo buffer into BacTiter-Glo substrate These reagents are part of a set - Promega's BacTiter-Glo Assay.
Aliquot 50 µL of cells into two wells of 96-well plate (duplicates)
Add 50 µL of BacTiter Glo reagent mix into each well

Measure luminescence using microplate reader Cytation 5 (Automated microscope; Multi-mode plate reader, BioTek, N.A., https://www.biotek.com/products/cytation.html , https://s3.amazonaws.com/protocols-files/public/f8b9495339723100175aa711858d9f685be6fad7d4aece5413e698de5acbb282/bsiu86se.png , https://s3.amazonaws.com/protocols-files/public/f8b9495339723100175aa711858d9f685be6fad7d4aece5413e698de5acbb282/bsit86se.png )
